title: Runeweaver - Ruins & Runes
description: A magic-based structure centric expansion mod with runes, ruins and more!
body:
![Runeweaver Stylized Text](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1058990048311259236/1481175466189525022/runeweaver_rnr_raster.png?ex=69b25ba6&is=69b10a26&hm=a750832c32bd6d7a32649c892fda9e2316d0f1e003164825a15f92e15f951d26&=&format=webp&quality=lossless&width=660&height=146)
# Runeweaver

Mod version on fabric & quilt requires fabric API to be installed.

**Runeweaver** introduces ancient runic magic scattered across mysterious structures throughout the world. Hidden relics, spells, and artifacts await those willing to explore forgotten ruins and lost guild outposts.

Travel across the land, uncover long-buried knowledge, and harness powerful abilities that alter movement, survival, and combat.

---

## Ancient Structures

Runeweaver’s power is not crafted — it is **discovered**.

Across the world you may encounter forgotten locations such as:

- Trial Stations
- Dithering Dungeons
- The Pillars
- Ruins of Velen
- Ruins of Aywin
- Guild Outposts
- Wild Huts

Each structure hides unique runes, spells, relics, and rare artifacts.

## Additional Structures

Runeweaver's world is vast and the structures span across biomes.. although all the structures may not hold runic power, they are still vital to this world.

- Farms
- Lanterns
- King's Mines
- Contract Centre
- Pillar of Despair
- Cartographer's Lair
- Quartermaster's Base

---

## Runes

Runes grant **active abilities** that can be triggered by the player.

Examples include:

- **Rune of Mace** – Launch yourself high into the air.
- **Rune of Dashing** – Dash rapidly in the direction you are moving.
- **Rune of Disappearance** – Drop smoke and vanish briefly.
- **Rune of Claws** – Summon fangs from beneath the earth.

Runes emphasize mobility, escape, and aggressive playstyles.

---

## Spells

Spells grant **passive magical enhancements**.

Some examples:

- **Dolphin Spell** – Greatly increases underwater breathing.
- **Clutch Spell** – Negates fall damage entirely.
- **Breaker Spell** – Massively increases mining speed.
- **Stealth Spell** – Improves sneaking movement.

These enchantments allow players to specialize their playstyle.

---

## Artifacts & Relics

Runeweaver also introduces rare magical items such as:

- **Blazing Protectant Shard** – Reduces burning duration
- **Weighted Feather** – Increases gravity
- **Long Armed Gemstone** – Extends interaction reach
- **Shield of the Village** – Provides massive knockback resistance

Rare armor sets like the **Runeweaver Armor** increase maximum health with each piece worn.

---

## Forbidden Magic

Some relics were never meant to be used.

- **Aywin’s Musket** – A mysterious experimental ranged artifact
- **Mage’s Lucky Crown** – Grants immense luck and safe fall distance
- **Blood of Youth** – Powerful regeneration at a terrible cost

In Runeweaving, power always has a price.

---

**Seek structures. Claim power. Weave fate.**
